vBRIEFInfo.description: Story 3 of #883 v1: rebind triage v1 surface onto cache:*. Delete task triage:cache + triage:show (hard cutover, no shims). Rewrite 4 triage scripts to consume cache:get. Rewrite refinement skill Phase 0 prose. External surface unchanged for kept tasks. Wave 3; depends on Story 2's cache:get + meta.json schema.

plan.title: refactor(triage): rebind v1 surface onto cache:* (#883 Story 3)

narratives.Problem: Triage v1 (#845) ships its own scripts/triage_cache.py and tasks/triage-cache.yml that mirror upstream issue bodies into a triage-specific layout. After Story 2 lands, the unified cache:* surface owns all content mirroring; triage v1's cache surface becomes redundant + drift-prone (#915 root cause was exactly this drift). Story 3 deletes the redundant triage-side cache and rebinds the 13 kept triage:* tasks (accept, reject, defer, needs-ac, mark-duplicate, bulk-*, status, reset, history, refresh-active, bootstrap) onto cache:get. Phase 0 of the refinement skill is rewritten so its three-tier inventory model points at cache:* for Tier 1.
narratives.Overview: DELETE: scripts/triage_cache.py, tasks/triage-cache.yml, parent Taskfile.yml triage-cache include. REWRITE 4 scripts: triage_bulk.py + triage_actions.py + triage_refresh.py + triage_bootstrap.py to consume the cache:get interface from Story 2 instead of reading .deft-cache/issues/<owner>-<repo>/<N>.{json,md} directly. EDIT: skills/deft-directive-refinement/SKILL.md Phase 0 prose (~30-50 lines) -- update Tier 1 references to point at cache:*, update task names throughout, preserve the three-tier inventory model and action menu structure verbatim. Hard cutover: task triage:cache and task triage:show are removed entirely with no deprecation shims (epic design decision; documented in epic design_doc_departures via Story 4's UPGRADING.md).
narratives.Constraint: EXTERNAL surface UNCHANGED for: triage:accept, triage:reject, triage:defer, triage:needs-ac, triage:mark-duplicate, triage:bulk-accept, triage:bulk-reject, triage:bulk-defer, triage:bulk-needs-ac, triage:status, triage:reset, triage:history, triage:refresh-active, triage:bootstrap. EXTERNALLY REMOVED: triage:cache, triage:show. Internal-only changes: which on-disk path the scripts read. Audit log (vbrief/.eval/candidates.jsonl) unchanged. Story 4 owns UPGRADING.md migration text. triage_bootstrap.py rewrite scope (M3 from epic) is explicitly: orchestrate `task cache:fetch-all --source=github-issue` + audit-log init + gitignore-ensure for both `.deft-cache/` and `vbrief/.eval/`. PowerShell 5.1 non-ASCII rule (#798) governs all file edits; the refinement skill prose contains Unicode markers (! ~ ⊗ ?) so all edits MUST go through Python pathlib + utf-8.
narratives.Outcome: task triage:* surface (13 kept tasks) functionally identical to v0.25.2 from the user's perspective; internal implementation reads via cache:get. task triage:cache and task triage:show: removed (Task 'triage:cache' does not exist on master post-merge; Story 4 documents the migration in UPGRADING.md). scripts/triage_cache.py: deleted. tasks/triage-cache.yml: deleted. Refinement skill Phase 0 reads as a clean three-tier model (Tier 1 = cache:*, Tier 2 = vbrief/.eval/candidates.jsonl, Tier 3 = vbrief/proposed/) with all task names updated. v0.25.2 integration test (tests/integration/test_triage_smoke.py) needs minor update to reflect new internal call path; external behaviors preserved.
narratives.Test: Regression tests per rebound script using fake cache fixtures (no real `task cache:get` invocations in CI; subprocess mocked or cache:get function imported directly when scripts move to in-process call). triage_bulk.py: regression test that bulk-defer reads candidates via cache:get (asserts the call); audit log invariants from v0.25.2 still hold. triage_actions.py: per-action tests assert cache:get is the read path. triage_refresh.py: regression test that meta.json.fetched_at is consulted for staleness (vs the prior pattern of stat()-ing .deft-cache/issues/<N>.json). triage_bootstrap.py: regression test that the new sequence (cache:fetch-all + audit-log init + dual gitignore-ensure) runs idempotently. Refinement skill: content tests assert Phase 0 prose references cache:* (not triage:cache) and the three-tier model is preserved.
narratives.Action: Delete triage_cache.py + triage-cache.yml + their parent include line. Rewrite 4 triage scripts to consume cache:get. Update tests/test_triage_*.py accordingly. Edit refinement SKILL.md Phase 0. Single PR. Run review-cycle. Merge. Story 4 dispatch unblocks.

items.title: DELETE: scripts/triage_cache.py + tasks/triage-cache.yml + parent tasks/Taskfile.yml triage-cache include line; verify task triage:cache and task triage:show no longer resolve in `task -l`
Rewrite scripts/triage_bulk.py: drop v0.25.2's _list_cached_candidates helper; consume cache:get for candidate body retrieval; preserve audit-log Tier-2 short-circuit invariants verbatim

Rewrite scripts/triage_actions.py: per-action body reads via cache:get instead of triage_cache.show; preserve all 8 actions semantics (accept/reject/defer/needs-ac/mark-duplicate/status/reset/history)

Rewrite scripts/triage_refresh.py: read meta.json.fetched_at via cache:get for staleness detection (compare to live `gh issue view <N> --json updatedAt`); preserve three-way drift prompt (proceed-with-stale / refresh-and-update-local / defer-from-this-batch)

Rewrite scripts/triage_bootstrap.py (M3 explicit scope): orchestrate task cache:fetch-all --source=github-issue + audit-log init + gitignore-ensure for both .deft-cache/ and vbrief/.eval/; idempotent re-run; gitcrawl install path optional or dropped per epic design

Edit skills/deft-directive-refinement/SKILL.md Phase 0 prose (~30-50 lines): Tier 1 references point at cache:* (not triage:cache); task name references throughout updated; three-tier inventory model + action menu structure preserved verbatim; UTF-8 safe via Python pathlib

External surface for 13 kept triage:* tasks unchanged: accept, reject, defer, needs-ac, mark-duplicate, bulk-accept, bulk-reject, bulk-defer, bulk-needs-ac, status, reset, history, refresh-active, bootstrap. Verified by re-running v0.25.2 smoke test pattern against the rebound scripts

Update / add regression tests: test_triage_bulk.py + test_triage_actions.py + test_triage_refresh.py + test_triage_bootstrap.py with fake cache fixtures asserting cache:get is the new read path; tests/integration/test_triage_smoke.py updated as needed for new internal calls
Content tests on refinement SKILL.md Phase 0 assert: cache:* tokens present, triage:cache token absent, three-tier inventory model preserved, action menu structure intact
task check passes (validate + lint + test + verify:encoding + verify:branch); coverage threshold maintained

CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] -> ### Changed: refactor(triage): rebind v1 surface onto cache:*; remove task triage:cache and task triage:show (hard cutover; migration in UPGRADING.md per Story 4) (#883 Story 3)

blocks_stories: Story 4 (migration docs + release; needs the rebind to be complete before UPGRADING.md text is final)
files_must_not_touch: scripts/quarantine_ext.py (legacy; Story 2 reuses; Story 3 doesn't touch)
x-tracking.pr_title_prefix: refactor(triage): rebind v1 surface onto cache:* (#883 Story 3)

references.title: Issue #883 (parent epic): feat(processes): deft-cache -- unified content cache and quarantine layer
Epic vBRIEF for #883 v1 (parent decomposition; this story is item 3 of 4)
Issue #845: pre-ingest triage workflow (this story replaces #845's cache surface; the actions/audit-log surfaces stay)
Issue #915 (P0): triage_bulk.py bypasses Tier-1 cache (root-cause for the rebind; this story removes the drift surface entirely)
